final_prompt.prompt:
Create an Instagram-ready photo of Korean café style featuring fashionable coffee and desserts, shot as if on a smartphone, with meaningful hand-drawn annotations added to each element in the style of rough magazine notes.

Style/medium: smartphone photography with hand-drawn annotation overlay, the casual elegance of Korean café culture captured in natural light, with white pen sketch lines in rough, slightly uneven single-stroke style
Composition: overhead or 45-degree angle shot, coffee cup and dessert plate arranged on marble or light wood table surface, generous negative space for the handwritten annotations to breathe
Subject: a latte with delicate foam art in a ceramic cup, a slice of layered cake or pastry on a small plate, perhaps a spoon or napkin as supporting props
Scene/backdrop: minimalist Korean café interior with soft natural light from window, clean surfaces, gentle shadows suggesting afternoon calm
Lighting/mood: the warm honey light of a quiet afternoon, soft window light creating gentle shadows, the meditative pause of solo café time
Color palette: warm cream and coffee browns in conversation with soft pastels from the dessert, neutral marble or wood tones, the temperature of comfort
Materials/textures: ceramic cup with gentle glaze, creamy foam with subtle sheen, cake with moist crumb texture, paper napkin with soft fiber, white ink lines with hand-drawn imperfection
Text (verbatim): 日语手写注释 scattered across the image — 饮料旁「さわやか、優しい甘み」、食物旁「しっとり、最高」、空间旁「リラックス、いい時間」、整体「幸せすぎる～」、with small doodles of steam, sparkles, hearts, tiny emoticons
Constraints: no people in frame, annotations must follow contour lines of objects with arrows and dotted lines for eye guidance, 70% hiragana and 30% simple kanji in handwriting, white pen lines only, Instagram story format with magazine rough-note aesthetic
Avoid: overcrowded annotations, losing the café atmosphere to decoration, perfect digital-looking lines, Western café clichés, excessive filters that kill the natural light warmth
